subject: TCS: 4QFY26 preview — Deal TCV acceleration intact; Buy reiterated
bodyText: We reiterate Buy on TCS with a 12-month price target of ₹4,800 (prior PT ₹4,500) ahead of the 4QFY26 print. Deal TCV continues to accelerate across BFSI and hi-tech, and our channel work shows Vantara contribution visible in the pipeline. Full note attached.
